title: Building with Anthropic's Fable 5 LIVE - Is It Really Worth the Hype?
summary: Cole Medin conducts a live test of Anthropic's Fable 5, evaluating whether the model's increased capability and 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8 justify the hype through real-world task performance.
writeup: Cole Medin runs a live test of Anthropic's Fable 5, putting the model through real-world tasks to gauge its capabilities firsthand. The central question is whether the model's added capability and 2x price premium over Claude Opus 4.8 justify the attention it has received. The takeaway is a cost-benefit assessment grounded in observed task performance rather than benchmark claims.
